items.title: [AI Feed Curator] State of the Feed — Week of June 29–5, 2026
items.content_html:
Week of June 29–July 5, 2026 processed 14 runs with 13,776 articles fetched and 672 quality articles delivered across eight content categories. News dominated intake at 350 articles, followed by wellness at 86 and AI-tech at 84. The dimensional Q/R/L composite scoring model (weights 0.25/0.55/0.20) maintained an average delivery rate of 48 quality articles per run. No new feeds were added during the week, and no benchmark data is available to assess pipeline efficiency against established noise-to-signal thresholds.
